info.name: Recycle Mart - Socket Chats (Socket.IO)
info.description:
Socket.IO chat namespace: /chat. Auth via handshake token (JWT access token).

Server expects token via:
- socket.handshake.auth.token OR
- Authorization: Bearer <token>

Note: This project does not expose REST chat endpoints; Socket events are the source of truth.

item.name: Socket Events (use in client emits)
item.description:
All client emits should use ack callback.
Ack format:
{
  success: boolean,
  message: string,
  data?: any,
  meta?: any,
  errorSources?: any[]
}

These are Socket events from src/app/modules/Chat/chat.socket.ts

request.description:
Client emit: chat:conversation:upsert
Payload:
{
  "adId": "<adId>",
  "participantId": "<userId>"
}

Ack success data: Conversation document

Client emit: chat:conversation:list
Payload:
{ "searchTerm": "", "page": 1, "limit": 20 }

Ack:
- data: conversations[]
- meta: pagination

Client emit: chat:conversation:join
Payload:
{ "conversationId": "<conversationId>" }

Server joins socket room = conversationId

Client emit: chat:typing
Payload:
{ "conversationId": "<conversationId>", "isTyping": true }

Server emits to others in room: chat:typing

Client emit: chat:conversation:read
Payload:
{ "conversationId": "<conversationId>" }

Marks read in DB (ConversationReadModel)

Client emit: chat:block
Payload:
{ "userId": "<blockedUserId>", "reason": "optional" }

Creates/updates ChatBlockModel (unique user+blockedUser)

Server emits: chat:message:new
Triggered after chat:message:send. Subscribe on client:
socket.on('chat:message:new', (msg) => { ... })
